findings.location: s3 — section title and introductory sentence for 未検討 items
findings.description: The knowledge file labels the 未検討 section as "未検討機能（フレームワークとしてサポート予定なし）" and states "以下の機能はフレームワークとして検討されていないため、**利用不可**である。" The source file uses only the heading "未検討" (not yet considered) with no statement that these features will not be supported or are unavailable. 未検討 means consideration has not yet occurred — it carries no implication of permanent rejection. Adding "サポート予定なし" and "利用不可" misrepresents the source and could cause developers to incorrectly conclude these features will never be provided.
findings.source_evidence: Source heading: "未検討" — no accompanying text states サポート予定なし or 利用不可. The items are simply listed without disposition.
